title: clerodendrum globosum
intro: Clerodendrum globosum is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family, commonly known as the globe pagoda or globe clerodendrum. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties. The leaves and stems of the plant have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its health benefits. Herbal preparations of Clerodendrum globosum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, creams, and ointments for topical application.
